root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) as memname , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code FROM sc_mem_m_share_mem ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered WHERE sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock = 0 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0'
